title: senecio extensus
intro: Senecio extensus, also known as woolly groundsel or tall groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The health benefits of Senecio extensus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Senecio extensus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicines for various health conditions.
